changes.summary: Use case now delegates to CommunityService.getRemainingPublicationCreateQuota / getRemainingDailyEmissionQuota with params.db, eliminating duplicated cap/window/aggregate/compute orchestration in the application layer.
Unchanged from attempt 2: shim routes through createGetRemainingQuotaUseCase().forPublicationCreate for tRPC/publications consumers.

getRemainingPublicationCreateQuota and getRemainingDailyEmissionQuota accept optional dbOverride forwarded to aggregateQuotaUsedSince, making domain methods the single orchestration site for both zone-8 and application callers.

success_criteria.single_use_case_owns_remaining_quota_cal: GetRemainingQuotaUseCase is the application entry; CommunityService.getRemaining* owns cap/window/aggregate/compute orchestration (one implementation, two entry paths)
success_criteria.routers_delegate_to_use_case: events.router and publication-creation-quota shim route through GetRemainingQuotaUseCase
success_criteria.V-01_blocker: document-variant.service.ts still imports trpc/helpers/publication-creation-quota (outside write_set); migrate to communityService.getRemainingPublicationCreateQuota(userId, communityId, community)
success_criteria.P-3_retirement_criterion_met: write_set complete; polls/votes/wallets.router inline helpers remain (outside write_set)

notes: Attempt 3 consolidates orchestration into CommunityService.getRemaining* with dbOverride; use case is a thin application facade. V-01 and full router P-3 retirement require follow-up work units on document-variant.service.ts and polls/votes/wallets routers.
